code.text: Specimen information

text.div:
Specimen information

Test20-MAY-2022Specimen
Appearance of UrineCloudy urineUrine
Odor of UrineUrine smell ammoniacalUrine
Clarity of UrineTranslucentUrine
Color of UrineBrown colorUrine

Annotation

Conclusion and Recommendations based on this report and previous findings known to us
The patient shows elevated serum creatinine, indicating impaired renal function. Urinalysis reveals significant proteinuria, glucosuria, ketonuria, low specific gravity, and abnormal urine appearance, suggesting possible diabetic nephropathy or another renal pathology. Hemoglobin A1c is low, which may reflect recent hypoglycemia or anemia. Recommend further nephrological evaluation and assessment for underlying metabolic or systemic disease.
